# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: my-app-network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      name: my-app-network
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true

  - name: sql-instance
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
    properties:
      project: $PROJECT_ID
      region: $REGION
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_6
      settings:
        tier: DB_N1_STANDARD_1
        activationPolicy: ALWAYS
      name: my-app-sql-instance

  - name: sql-db
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
    properties:
      instance: $(sql-instance.selfLink)
      region: $REGION
      name: my-app-sql-db
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_6

  - name: bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      location: $REGION
      name: my-app-bucket

  - name: compute-engine
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroup
    properties:
      baseInstanceName: my-app-compute-engine
      instanceTemplate:
        properties:
          machineType: n1-standard-2
          disk:
            deviceName: boot
            sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/debian-9-stretch-v20210125

  - name: load-balancer-forwarding-rule
    type: compute.v1 regionalBackendServiceForwardingRule
    properties:
      region: $REGION
      name: my-app-lb-forwarding-rule
      backendService: $(lb-backend-service.selfLink)

  - name: lb-backend-service
    type: compute.v1.regionBackendService
    properties:
      healthCheck:
        portName: http
        checkIntervalSec: 10
        timeoutSec: 5
        healthyThreshold: 2
        unhealthyThreshold: 3
      region: $REGION
      name: my-app-lb-backend-service
      backends:
        - group: $(compute-engine.selfLink)
          balance: ROUND_ROBIN

  - name: lb-attachment
    type: compute.v1.regionBackendServiceAttachment
    properties:
      healthCheck:
        portName: http
        checkIntervalSec: 10
        timeoutSec: 5
        healthyThreshold: 2
        unhealthyThreshold: 3
      region: $REGION
      name: my-app-lb-attachment

  - name: lb-forwarding-rule
    type: compute.v1.regionForwardingRule
    properties:
      region: $REGION
      name: my-app-lb-forwarding-rule
      loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
      backendService: $(lb-backend-service.selfLink)

  - name: target-instance-group
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
    properties:
      zone: $ZONE
      baseInstanceName: my-app-target-instances
      instanceTemplate:
        properties:
          machineType: n1-standard-2

  - name: auto-scaling
    type: compute.v1.regionAutoscaler
    properties:
      region: $REGION
      name: my-app-auto-scaler
      target: $(target-instance-group.selfLink)
